# comfyui_image_to_mask (Resource)

ComfyUI ImageToMask node — Convert Image to Mask [mask]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel` (String) Input: COMBO
- `image` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)
